methods.description: Process for collecting and identifying fossils from the Zillerleite outcrop, including the identification of insect fossils and associated fish remains.

steps.description: The described insect was found together with some fish remains, mostly isolated scales, by manually splitting of the exposed shales.
steps.searchable_summary: manually split shales to collect insect and fish fossils

methods.description: Procedure for photographing the collected fossil using specific camera equipment to document its features.

steps.description: The fossil was photographed using an Olympus OM-D EM10 with Olympus 60 mm/2.8 Macro lens, dry and under isopropanol.
steps.searchable_summary: photograph fossil using Olympus OM-D EM10 with 60 mm macro lens
